summary: REQ-43 is well-implemented in the diff. The ShopPage.tsx file now includes a real-time client-side search bar that filters products by name or description (case-insensitive), shows a friendly empty-state message when no products match, allows clearing the query to restore the full grid, and uses a result count indicator. Styling uses warm-tone/muted classes consistent with the Lunara Jewels theme. No backend changes were made. All acceptance criteria appear to be satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: Result count display when a search query is active (e.g., 'Showing X results for ...')
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff/file summary mentions a result count paragraph rendered when searchQuery is active. This was not requested in REQ-43 or its acceptance criteria.
